channel.title: World Models Reading List on Utsab's Digital Garden
channel.description: Recent content in World Models Reading List on Utsab's Digital Garden

item.title: What to Read
item.description: Foundational World Models — Ha & Schmidhuber, NeurIPS 2018 https://arxiv.org/abs/1803.10122 Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels (PlaNet) — Hafner et al., ICML 2019 https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.04551 Dream to Control: Learning Behaviors by Latent Imagination (DreamerV1) — Hafner et al., ICLR 2020 https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.01603 Mastering Chess and Shogi by Self-Play with a General Reinforcement Learning Algorithm (AlphaZero) — Silver et al., Science 2018 https://arxiv.org/abs/1712.01815 Core MBRL Mastering Atari with Discrete World Models (DreamerV2) — Hafner et al.
